title: Porky's Legacy (HORROR)
description: (CANCELLED) The mod has been altered by something inside of it, an entity capable of stalking and hunting the player in many ways. Nothing seems to know about this, but would you?
body:
# CANCELLED???!
_I'll imagine your surprise about this cancellation, this mod was a good idea, but was oversaturated and became an obstacle to future projects that I have in mind. It's hard even for me, but It's the best solution. If you've played the last version of this mod you will notice how the game sometimes feels laggy or bad optimized, I never though how tuff is optimizing a project in MCreator._

_Sorry for everyone expecting new content :(_

_In this [POST](https://youtube.com/post/Ugkxadpe7qHj-DCM89C3BgEPfp3VuX9AkmTq?si=ya97G7P0DKvhs2WL) I've explained a bit more._

# DESCRIPTION (OLD)

This mod adds entities that I've made in the past, so I'll give them a use on this mod, there would be 5 in total, and they will spawn every day (in-game there's a calendar where you can see which entity activates every day and updates every month).

# WHAT CAN YOU EXPECT ABOUT THIS MOD? (OLD)

This mod is nothing new nowadays, there would be 5 entities which will hunt the player with 3 modes in each one.

This mod is compatible from 1 to EVEN MORE than 8 players in the same server, and it will spawn quicker about how many players are inside.

Only 1 ENTITY can exist at the same time, because the entity will haunt 1 player at a time.

Every way of haunting the player would be different for each entity.

There will be 5 BIG versions in total, each BIG version would get a new entity, but the smaller ones will add content or fix bugs.

Here's an example of how the versions would work:

- X.0.0 = BIG VERSION;
- 0.X.0 = CONTENT VERSION;
- 0.0.X = BUGFIX VERSION;

_If you want to keep updated, I'll recommend you to follow my TikTok or my YouTube to know new things I'm developing ;)_

_~~If you find any bugs, please let me know to fix them ;)~~_
